title.en: However, they walked through the leaves, and th...

content.en:
Immediately, Ye Tian stared at the giant tree, and he found that the leaves of this giant tree were exactly the same as the one used by the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast.

Obviously, the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast used this kind of leaf to escape here, but it's a pity that the activation efficiency of this leaf is a little slower, and it is not only to teleport the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast, and the life close to it will also be traditional, and if it is used to escape, the effect is a little worse.

Of course, it was also possible that the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demonic Beast would not use this leaf.

But it is undeniable that the value of this leaf is very high, and it is not an ordinary treasure~.

Immediately, Ye Tian reached out and grabbed these leaves, and Sui and the others also discovered the value of this kind of leaves, and naturally wanted to take some of them.

However, they walked through the leaves, and they didn't touch them.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was a little surprised, but he didn't have too many doubts, because if these leaves were really so easy to take, the Myriad Pupil Void Demon Beast would definitely not take just one, but all of them.

But now it seems that this kind of leaf should not be easy to take, otherwise such a magical leaf would definitely be gone a long time ago.

"God, what's going on?"

Sui and the others asked.

Ye Tian didn't answer immediately, but studied it.

He touched the giant tree again, but he still couldn't touch it.

He was very curious about how the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast took away a leaf.

"I don't understand it either, but I'm going to look into it here. "

Ye Tian said.

"Then we'll study it here. Sui said.

Immediately, they stayed here, and if there were Void Demon Beasts attacking, Ye Tian would kill them casually.

As time passed, Ye Tian gradually gained some understanding of this giant tree.

This giant tree actually contains an ultimate way that can turn itself into an illusion, and it is difficult to reach it, unless it is to crack this ultimate way.

And the pupil technique of the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast should be able to reach this kind of leaf before it can take away a leaf, but it is definitely not so easy to take away, and it is estimated that it took a long time.

"Create your own ultimate arcane art against this ultimate path, and you can take this leaf!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to create this ultimate arcane here, and with his understanding and perception, it would not take long to create an ultimate arcane.

And in this era, there are ultimate particles everywhere, and heaven and earth are more suitable for creating ultimate arcane, so he can create them soon.

But after a long time, they wanted to leave.

"God, can you send it out?"

Sui asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian immediately sent Sui them out, if there was no escort from him, with Sui and their strength, there would be no way to get out alive, and they would definitely be torn apart and swallowed by those Void Demon Beasts.

Soon.

They came to the exit of the Void Demon Valley.

"I remember that after I went back, I said that I went to practice, don't reveal my strength!" Ye Tian reminded.

"Good!"

Sui, they agreed.

After that, Ye Tian returned to the giant tree in the Void Demon Valley again and continued to research and create the ultimate arcane.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian created a satisfying ultimate arcane art—the Hand of the Void Demon!

I saw that he condensed a Void Demon hand and grabbed it at the top of the giant tree, and a leaf was easily plucked by him.

At this time, he truly sensed the power contained in this leaf.

"The power of the ultimate space particle, no wonder the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast can use it to escape and return here. It's a pity that the use of the Ten Thousand Pupils Void Demon Beast is too ordinary, if I use it, I can easily use it to escape very far, and it is an instant escape, and the location can also be determined by myself!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he doesn't need this kind of thing, his telekinetic ability is even stronger, but if this kind of leaf is refined and given to some soldiers, it is definitely a good thing to save his life, and it is definitely worth a lot of money.

Immediately, he plucked the leaves one by one, and in a short time he had taken all the leaves of the giant tree.

However, he did not leave, and set his sights on the main trunk of the giant tree again.

Rumble!!!!

The Void Demon's hand slammed into the trunk and grabbed a drop of liquid substance.

His physical fitness was increasing, and the ultimate particle was also growing, as if his body was transforming.

"Good stuff!"

Ye Tian continued to grasp the liquid, and after a while, he took all the liquid.

At this time, the giant tree gradually collapsed, and even a piece of ultimate space was also collapsing, gradually turning into nothingness.

The Giant Tree was originally an ultimate treasure tree, but unfortunately it lost its leaves and internal origin, and naturally it came to the end of its life, and it could only fall into destruction.

"This Void Demon Valley is a good place, but it is definitely still very dangerous inside, I can detect that the secrets of this Void Demon Valley are not small, but now is not the time to continue exploring!"

So, he immediately left.

And just after Ye Tian left, a pair of huge pupils in the depths of the Void Demon Valley opened, and then fell into silence again.

If Ye Tian saw this scene, he would know what a terrifying existence the owner of these pupils was.

......

Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian came back, and Sui and the others came over one after another.

"Oh my God, you're finally back!"

Sui said excitedly.

"You didn't reveal anything about me, did you?" asked Ye Tian.

Sui hurriedly said, "No, we didn't say anything. "

"This is for you!"

Ye Tian took out the leaves of the giant tree, each leaf had been refined by him, and it was easy to urge.

When Sui and the others saw these leaves, they immediately recognized them.

"God, you're amazing, you really did it!"

They took the leaves one after another, and then put them away.

After returning to the tribe, Ye Tian was ready to retreat for a period of time, using that special liquid to temper his body, raise his strength to the limit of the soldier level, and then condense his ultimate body of ten thousand laws to break through to the general level.

Time flies.

Some time has passed.

Now.

Ye Tian's physical fitness has been extremely strong, reaching the limit of the soldier level in this era.

But he knew very well that his current physical fitness was definitely more terrifying than the body of a high-level Ultimate Realm Lord in his time.

However, it's put here.,It's very ordinary.,It's just the limit of the military level.。。
